title: Korak 4

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your getLoanMessage function should return a string if the applicant qualifies for a condo and car loan.
Your getLoanMessage function should return the string "You qualify for a condo and car loan.".
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(getLoanMessage(45000, 680), "You qualify for a condo and car loan.");

tests.text: Your getLoanMessage function should return undefined if the applicant's annual income and credit score do not meet the requirements for a condo loan.

description:
Ako je godišnji prihod podnosioca zahteva veći ili jednak minIncomeForCondo, I ako je njihov kreditni rejting veći ili jednak minCreditScoreForCondo, onda su kvalifikovani za kredit za kondo i auto.

Proverite da li je to tačno u funkciji getLoanMessage. Ako jeste, vratite string "You qualify for a condo and car loan."
